reviewer: thầy (repository owner) — decision; Claude Sonnet 5 — robots.txt/technical findings

termsOfUseResult.publisherStatedPosition: Full Huyền Khí theory not public; publisher warns imitation scores may be inaccurate.

knownTechnicalLimitations: Detail/result pages (la-so-tu-vi-*.html, including lid-suffixed and TokenID query-param variants) render via client-side JavaScript/AJAX and return only a loading interstitial to a non-JS fetch — full twelve-palace data cannot be collected for new records this way.
Calendar day pages (lich-la-so-tu-vi-ngay-D-M-YYYY.html) render server-side and do expose real Mệnh score + whole-chart total per hour, but not the other eleven palace scores.

solarToLunar (this repo's Calculation Core) can disagree with the site's own stated lunar date by up to 1 day near lunar-month boundaries — every resolved date must be cross-verified against the site's own calendar page, not trusted from the engine alone.
